name: llm-field-notes
description: A document-to-knowledge-graph workspace with Obsidian projections.

scripts.test: node --check app.js && node --check graph-core.js && node --check graph-store.js && node --check extractor-adapter.js && node --check projection-adapter.js && node --check storage-adapter.js && node --check evaluation.js && node --check server.mjs && node --check sw.js && node --check scripts/public-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/build-pages.mjs && node --check tests/pages-smoke.mjs && node --check experiments/tiny-attention.mjs && node --check experiments/tiny-bpe.mjs && node --check experiments/tiny-training.mjs && node --check experiments/tiny-transformer.mjs && node --check experiments/evaluate-feedback.mjs && node --check experiments/compare-evaluations.mjs && node --check experiments/inspect-graph.mjs && node --check experiments/diff-graphs.mjs && node --check scripts/check-release.mjs && node scripts/check-release.mjs && node scripts/build-pages.mjs && node tests/smoke.mjs && node tests/extractor-smoke.mjs && node tests/projection-smoke.mjs && node tests/storage-smoke.mjs && node tests/evaluation-smoke.mjs && node tests/experiment-smoke.mjs && node tests/bpe-smoke.mjs && node tests/training-smoke.mjs && node tests/transformer-smoke.mjs && node tests/normalization-fuzz.mjs && node tests/server-smoke.mjs && node tests/site-check.mjs && node tests/http-smoke.mjs && node tests/pages-smoke.mjs && node tests/sw-smoke.mjs
